reference: My son had what I thought was a little black mark on his arm the other day, but when I tried to wash it off, it would not come off. It didn't look like a scrape either. Now, a few days later, it is red and bumpy. It no longer has the black color to it.
text: My son had what I thought was a little black mark on his arm the other day, but when I tried to wash it off, it would not come off. It didn't look like a scrape. Now a few days later, it is red and bumpy. It no longer has the black color to it.
